case_title: P W FU VS. DENNIS TOYAMA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT OF BENCH OFFICER. (206)
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR RECONSIDERATION OF FEE WAIVER APPLICATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON P W FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF P W FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DECLARING BOWAN FU (AKA: PO WAN FU, P.W. FU AND PW FU) A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO PLAINTIFF: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER. RETURN TO SENDER NO LONGER HERE.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON COURT'S MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOYAMA, DENNIS (COURT CLERK)
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) SC-100 AND POS-10 BLANK FORMS. PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
SC-105, REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT TOYAMA, DENNIS (COURT CLERK)
OFF CALENDAR-CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER OF 10-30-12. (D506)
RESCHEDULED EARLY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
NOTICE - COURT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
TO DISMISS FRIVOLOUS PREFILING ORDER FOR UNSUBSTANTIATED ACCUSATION OF VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND NONSENSICAL FEE WAIVER RECONSIDERATIONS IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
COPYING FEES (16 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, P W
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624. CASE IS ASSIGNED TO VISITING JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR FOR HEARING. (206)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,024.80 FILED BY FU, P W AS TO DEFENDANT TOYAMA, DENNIS (COURT CLERK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2012 AT 10:00AM TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT.
